global.description: The ad features a vibrant layout with a focus on promoting trending content.
global.main_message: Promoting trending content on FluxStream with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Abstract shapes background
elements.description: A soft, abstract background featuring overlapping circles and rectangles in muted tones.

elements.label: FluxStream logo
elements.description: A stylized logo for FluxStream, prominently displayed at the top with a bold font.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A bright yellow SALE badge with a bold font, positioned near the logo.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small circular icon labeled 'UGC' in white text on a contrasting background.

elements.label: Trending message
elements.description: A clear, bold text message stating 'Watch what's trending' with a smaller line below it saying 'Cancel anytime'.

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Watch now' in a bold font, designed to attract attention.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo and SALE badge are at the top, followed by the body text in the center, and the CTA button at the bottom.
